title: addBook allows unknown authorId
body: The addBook resolver creates a book without verifying the author exists, producing books whose author resolves to null.

title: No pagination on books query
body: Query.books returns the full list. Add first/after cursor pagination.

title: book(id) returns null without an error
body: Querying a missing book returns null silently; consider a typed NotFound error in the schema.

title: Author N+1 query problem
body: The Book.author resolver calls authors.byId per book, causing N+1 lookups. Add a dataloader-style batch.

title: No mutation to add authors
body: AuthorRepo.add exists but no GraphQL mutation exposes it, so authors can only be seeded in code.

title: Book ids are not stable across restarts
body: BookRepo uses an in-memory counter; ids reset on restart. Document or persist the sequence.

title: createSchema does not seed sample data
body: There is no way to start the server with demo authors/books for local testing.
